# GoldRush Skills
> 138 copy-paste code skills for building onchain products with the GoldRush API (by Covalent).

GoldRush Skills is a developer resource directory for the GoldRush multichain data API.
Each skill is a focused, production-ready code snippet using the @covalenthq/client-sdk
or @covalenthq/goldrush-kit that solves a specific onchain data problem.

## What is GoldRush?
GoldRush (by Covalent) is a unified blockchain data API supporting 200+ EVM and non-EVM chains.
SDK: @covalenthq/client-sdk
UI Kit: @covalenthq/goldrush-kit
Docs: https://goldrush.dev/docs
API Key: https://goldrush.dev

## Core Services
- BalanceService — token balances, ERC-20 transfers, historical portfolio, NFT holdings
- TransactionService — transaction history, summaries, decoded receipts, block transactions
- NftService — NFT metadata, collection traits, rarity, transfer history, chain collections
- PricingService — historical token prices, spot prices, market cap
- SecurityService — wallet approvals (ERC-20 + NFT), risk scoring
- BaseService — event logs, blocks, chain status, multi-chain activity scan
- AllChainsService — cross-chain wallet discovery, portfolio aggregation

## Supported Chains (sample)
eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet, arbitrum-mainnet, optimism-mainnet,
bsc-mainnet, avalanche-mainnet, linea-mainnet, scroll-mainnet, zksync-mainnet,
blast-mainnet, mantle-mainnet, fantom-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet, celo-mainnet,
moonbeam-mainnet, zora-mainnet, solana-mainnet, btc-mainnet, aptos-mainnet,
sui-mainnet, cosmos-mainnet, osmosis-mainnet, aurora-mainnet, tron-mainnet,
and 200+ more.

## Skill Categories

### Wallet (11 skills)
- net-worth-calculator — total USD net worth across tokens on any chain
- portfolio-tracker — full token balances with USD values and logos
- portfolio-history — 30-day rolling historical portfolio value
- historical-portfolio-value — P&L chart data (open/close/high/low per token/day)
- wallet-erc20-transfers — full ERC-20 transfer history, filterable by token
- native-token-balance — lightweight native token balance check (ETH, MATIC, BNB…)
- wallet-age-summary — first tx date, total tx count, wallet age in days
- transaction-history — paginated full transaction feed
- wallet-activity-feed — decoded activity timeline
- wallet-balances-skill — balances with spam filter
- wallet-attestations — on-chain attestations and identity signals

### DeFi (10 skills)
- defi-position-tracker — active DeFi positions across protocols
- dex-trade-history — DEX swap history for a wallet
- liquidity-pool-monitor — LP position monitoring
- yield-dashboard — yield positions and claimable rewards
- protocol-revenue-feed — protocol fee revenue via event logs
- cross-chain-liquidity-map — liquidity distribution across chains
- defi-bad-debt-monitor — lending protocol liquidation tracking
- stablecoin-dominance-tracker — stablecoin supply and peg monitoring
- rwa-real-estate-portfolio — tokenised real estate (RealT, etc.)
- rwa-tokenized-treasury-tracker — tokenised treasuries (BUIDL, OUSG)

### NFT (12 skills)
- nft-portfolio-valuation — wallet NFT holdings with floor prices
- nft-metadata-fetcher — single NFT metadata, traits, image
- nft-transfer-tracker — NFT transfer history
- collection-floor-monitor — collection floor price tracking
- rarity-analyzer — trait rarity scoring
- nft-collection-browser — browse all collections on a chain with volume/floor
- nft-traits-explorer — all trait types and value distributions for a collection
- nft-gallery-viewer — drop-in GoldRush Kit NFT gallery component
- nft-sale-history — full sale/transfer history for a single token
- nft-liquidity-scorer — liquidity score based on sale frequency
- nft-royalty-tracking — creator royalty income tracking
- nft-wash-trading-detector — wash trading pattern detection

### Analytics (32 skills)
- chain-activity-dashboard — chain-level activity metrics
- gas-analytics — gas price and usage analytics
- event-log-decoder — decode smart contract event logs
- token-price-history — historical prices for any token
- onchain-data-query — arbitrary on-chain data queries
- contract-event-log-monitor — monitor any contract for specific events (getLogs)
- cross-contract-event-scanner — scan entire chain for event by topic hash
- block-explorer-toolkit — block details + all transactions in a block
- wallet-activity-heatmap — daily transaction count heatmap
- dao-voter-intelligence — governance participation and voting patterns
- institutional-wallet-tracker — track known institutional/VC wallets
- fund-flow-intelligence — multi-hop fund flow tracing
- stablecoin-dominance-tracker — stablecoin market analytics
- onchain-credit-score — composite credit scoring from on-chain signals
- developer-wallet-classifier — classify wallets by type (developer/retail/whale)
- chain-health-scorecard — real-time sync status for all supported chains
- treasury-management-intelligence — DAO treasury portfolio analysis
- macro-onchain-sentiment — macro on-chain activity signals
- berachain-intelligence — Berachain-specific wallet and DeFi data
- scroll-and-linea-intelligence — zkEVM portfolio and activity data
- starknet-intelligence — StarkNet bridge and bridged asset tracking
- solana-program-analytics — Solana wallet balances and SPL tokens
- sui-and-aptos-intelligence — Move VM (Aptos, Sui) portfolio data
- cosmos-ecosystem — Cosmos/Osmosis IBC token balances
- near-protocol-intelligence — NEAR Aurora EVM data
- ton-blockchain-intelligence — TON bridge activity on Ethereum
- tron-ecosystem-monitor — TRON/TRC-20 portfolio data
- polkadot-parachain-intelligence — Moonbeam/Moonriver/Astar portfolios
- hyperliquid-intelligence — Hyperliquid USDC bridge tracking
- ethereum-validator-intelligence — ETH staking deposit tracking
- carbon-credit-regen-tracker — Toucan BCT/MCO2 carbon credit portfolios
- cross-border-payment-analytics — stablecoin remittance flow analysis

### AI Agents (19 skills)
- agent-wallet-skill — give AI agents read access to wallet state
- autonomous-defi-agent — autonomous DeFi position management
- claude-goldrush-skill — Claude + GoldRush SDK integration
- goldrush-mcp-server — Model Context Protocol server for GoldRush
- onchain-memory-store — on-chain persistent memory for agents
- onchain-research-agent — autonomous on-chain research agent
- realtime-wallet-stream — real-time wallet event streaming
- agent-alpha-signal-extractor — extract alpha signals from smart-money wallets
- agent-counterparty-verification — verify counterparty wallets before agent txns
- agent-cross-chain-coordinator — coordinate agent actions across chains
- agent-data-budget-manager — track and optimise API credit usage
- agent-discovery-protocol — discover other on-chain agents
- agent-fleet-monitor — monitor health of multiple agent wallets
- agent-market-surveillance — real-time DEX/market surveillance for agents
- agent-onchain-news-aggregator — on-chain event feed for LLM context
- agent-payment-optimizer — optimal chain/route for agent payments
- agent-reputation-builder — build verifiable on-chain agent reputation
- agent-risk-circuit-breaker — automatic safety rails for agent wallets
- agent-yield-harvester — autonomous yield monitoring and harvesting

### Developer (10 skills)
- goldrush-typescript-sdk — @covalenthq/client-sdk setup and usage
- goldrush-react-hooks — React hooks for GoldRush data
- goldrush-playground — interactive API playground
- api-reference — full endpoint reference
- quickstart-templates — copy-paste starter templates
- webhook-builder — event-driven webhook setup
- goldrush-kit-token-balances — TokenBalancesListView React component
- goldrush-kit-approvals — ApprovalsListView React component with revoke
- goldrush-kit-tx-feed — WalletActivityListView React component
- all-chains-status — getAllChains + getAllChainStatuses monitor

### Cross-chain (8 skills)
- multichain-portfolio — unified portfolio across all chains
- address-activity-scanner — discover active chains for any wallet
- bridge-transaction-monitor — cross-chain bridge tracking
- chain-comparison-tool — compare chain metrics side by side
- cross-chain-address-lookup — same address across all EVM chains
- multichain-activity-discovery — getMultiChainActivity — scan 200+ chains
- multichain-token-aggregator — aggregate all token balances cross-chain
- cross-chain-transaction-history — merged tx history across multiple chains

### Tokens (12 skills)
- spot-price-ticker — current token price
- token-metadata-api — name/symbol/decimals/logo/supply
- token-holder-list — all holders of any ERC-20 token
- erc20-transfer-history — ERC-20 transfer history for a contract
- token-transfer-stream — real-time token transfer feed
- token-approval-scanner — active approval scanner
- token-price-history — historical price chart data (PricingService)
- token-holders-snapshot — paginated holder snapshot for airdrops/governance
- token-supply-metadata — supply, logo, decimals via PricingService
- token-exchange-flow-tracker — CEX inflow/outflow monitoring
- token-fee-revenue-correlation — protocol fee vs token price correlation
- token-memecoin-risk-scorer — memecoin concentration and risk scoring

### Identity (9 skills)
- ens-resolver — resolve ENS names and reverse lookups
- nft-gate — NFT ownership gating
- proof-of-onchain-activity — verify genuine on-chain history
- wallet-identity-graph — aggregate identity signals for a wallet
- onchain-social-graph — map wallet interaction graphs
- sybil-resistance-scorer — Sybil detection scoring
- reputation-score-aggregator — unified reputation score
- governance-token-snapshot — holder snapshot at block height for voting
- onchain-activity-verifier — verify activity depth for KYC-lite gates

### Security (15 skills)
- approval-auditor — full approval audit with risk levels
- mev-monitor — MEV exposure detection
- phishing-address-checker — known phishing address lookup
- token-risk-analyzer — token risk scoring
- contract-interaction-history — contract interaction history
- bridge-security-monitor — bridge TVL and large withdrawal alerts
- compliance-transaction-screening — AML/KYC transaction screening
- exploit-early-warning-system — volume anomaly detection for exploits
- mev-exposure-analyzer — MEV sandwich attack detection
- oracle-manipulation-detector — Chainlink oracle anomaly detection
- phishing-wallet-database — phishing wallet exposure check
- rugpull-pattern-detector — rug pull risk scoring
- smart-contract-interaction-risk — pre-interaction risk assessment
- token-approval-risk-scanner — unlimited approval risk scanner
- transaction-decoded-receipt — fully decoded transaction receipt

## How to use these skills
Each skill page at https://skills.goldrush.dev/tools/{slug} contains:
- A working TypeScript/JavaScript code snippet using @covalenthq/client-sdk
- The GoldRush API endpoint(s) used
- Supported chains
- Complexity level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
- Use case description
- Key parameters and response fields
- Credit cost estimate

## Quick start
```typescript
import { GoldRushClient } from "@covalenthq/client-sdk";
const client = new GoldRushClient("YOUR_API_KEY");

// Get all token balances for a wallet
const resp = await client.BalanceService.getTokenBalancesForWalletAddress(
  "eth-mainnet",
  "0xwalletAddress"
);
```

Get a free API key: https://goldrush.dev
Full SDK docs: https://goldrush.dev/docs/unified-api/sdk/
GoldRush Kit (React components): https://goldrush.dev/docs/goldrush-kit/
